description: Beyond the Veil Patch 1 - Ver. 21.010.1 (1 December 2022) — Roads of Avalon Changes, Mists Changes, Mount Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Roads of Avalon Changes

items.text: Direct connections between Hideout zones redirected to raid zones

subitems.text: Increases likelihood of raid zones having two separate connections at once

items.text: In non-Hideout Roads zones

subitems.text: Randomized Dungeon Maps no longer usable
Static Randomized Dungeons no longer appear in enchanted form

items.text: Resource mobs (Elemental, Dryad, Cougar, Wood Spirit) in Roads now spawn with full charges
Updated behavior of Avalonian mobs in Roads

subitems.text: Decreased knockback of Avalonian Monk and damage of the standard version
Added immediate spell cast to Monk, Warrior, Mage

items.text: Roads of Avalon group portals returned to their 7 charge maximums
Unstable Roads portal in Brecilien party slots increased to 7 to match the group portals
Zerg bubble threshold in non-raid Roads zones increased from 6 to 8

As a followup to the extension of Roads Hideout Grace Periods last week, the spawn rate of Hideout Power Cores in the Roads has been increased by 70%. This is to address the number of Power Cores that currently decay due to not being connected to a Hideout zone.

sections.searchable_text: Roads of Avalon Changes Direct connections between Hideout zones redirected to raid zones Increases likelihood of raid zones having two separate connections at once In non-Hideout Roads zones Randomized Dungeon Maps no longer usable Static Randomized Dungeons no longer appear in enchanted form Increased Static Randomized Dungeon rewards Resource mobs (Elemental, Dryad, Cougar, Wood Spirit) in Roads now spawn with full charges Updated behavior of Avalonian mobs in Roads Decreased knockback of Avalonian Monk and damage of the standard version Added immediate spell cast to Monk, Warrior, Mage Decreased Warrior attack power Roads of Avalon group portals returned to their 7 charge maximums Unstable Roads portal in Brecilien party slots increased to 7 to match the group portals Zerg bubble threshold in non-raid Roads zones increased from 6 to 8 As a followup to the extension of Roads Hideout Grace Periods last week, the spawn rate of Hideout Power Cores in the Roads has been increased by 70%. This is to address the number of Power Cores that currently decay due to not being connected to a Hideout zone.

sections.heading: Mists Changes

items.text: Tier 5 Mythical mobs now only spawn in lethal Mists, while Tier 4 Mythical mobs still exclusively spawn in nonlethal Mists.

Tier 5 Mythical mobs have had their loot tables decreased, but their spawn frequencies increased to offset this decrease. The goal of this change is to make these T5 mobs as common as possible while still guaranteeing they drop at least one artifact.
Further adjusted all mythical mobs to spawn +50% more frequently to account for "missed" mythical mobs that are spawned but never killed
The Long Hostile Dismount Cooldown in the Mists has been increased from 10s to 12s

sections.searchable_text: Mists Changes Tier 5 Mythical mobs now only spawn in lethal Mists, while Tier 4 Mythical mobs still exclusively spawn in nonlethal Mists. Tier 5 Mythical mobs have had their loot tables decreased, but their spawn frequencies increased to offset this decrease. The goal of this change is to make these T5 mobs as common as possible while still guaranteeing they drop at least one artifact. Further adjusted all mythical mobs to spawn +50% more frequently to account for "missed" mythical mobs that are spawned but never killed The Long Hostile Dismount Cooldown in the Mists has been increased from 10s to 12s

sections.heading: Mount Changes

items.text: Made mount-up times more consistent
Increased Item Power of Avalonian Basilisk to 1000 to match T7 mounts

sections.searchable_text: Mount Changes Made mount-up times more consistent Non-Battle Mounts now take 3s Battle Mounts now take 10s Increased Item Power of Avalonian Basilisk to 1000 to match T7 mounts HP Increase: 1239 → 1254 HP Regen Increase: 12.39 → 12.54

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Loadouts now separated by Personal and Guild in dropdown menu
Season 16 furniture items placeable
Improved visibility of enchantment effects for .4 weapons
Added unrestricted PvP zones to mob camps in the Mists
The lingering effect of the Invisibility Shrine buff after reveal no longer provides invincibility

sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Loadouts now separated by Personal and Guild in dropdown menu Season 16 furniture items placeable Improved visibility of enchantment effects for .4 weapons Added unrestricted PvP zones to mob camps in the Mists The lingering effect of the Invisibility Shrine buff after reveal no longer provides invincibility

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Axes

items.text: Razor Cut (Bear Paws)

subsections.searchable_text: Axes Razor Cut (Bear Paws) Range: 12m → 10m Energy Cost: 20 → 16

subsections.heading: Bows

items.text: Frost Shot (all Bows)
Ray of Light (all Bows)

subsections.searchable_text: Bows Frost Shot (all Bows) Cooldown: 15s → 18s Ray of Light (all Bows) Cooldown: 14s → 12s Hit Delay: 0.8s → 0.6s Standtime: 0.4s → 0.3s

subsections.heading: Crossbows

items.text: Caltrops (all Crossbows)

subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Caltrops (all Crossbows) Move Speed Increase: 20% → 30% Move Speed Duration: 2s → 3s Slow Strength: 40% → 30%

subsections.heading: Daggers

items.text: Lunging Stabs (Bloodletter)

subitems.text: Hitting player below 40% Health no longer increases cooldown rate
Instead, hitting player below 40% reduces ability cooldown by 40% (other slot cooldowns no longer affected)

subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Lunging Stabs (Bloodletter) Hitting player below 40% Health no longer increases cooldown rate Instead, hitting player below 40% reduces ability cooldown by 40% (other slot cooldowns no longer affected)

subsections.heading: War Gloves

items.text: Triple Kick (all War Gloves)
Falcon Smash (Battle Bracers)

subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Triple Kick (all War Gloves) Cooldown: 15s → 18s Falcon Smash (Battle Bracers) Range: 15m → 13m

subsections.heading: Armors

items.text: Bloodlust (Mercenary Jacket)

subsections.searchable_text: Armors Bloodlust (Mercenary Jacket) Heal per Tick: 42 → 54 Number of Ticks: 9 → 7

subsections.heading: Helmets

items.text: Force Field (all Cloth Helmets)
Poison (Mage Cowl)
Retaliate (Hunter Hood)

subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Force Field (all Cloth Helmets) Knockback Distance: 12m → 9m Poison (Mage Cowl) First Damage Tick: 1s → 0s Total Ticks: 5 → 3 Damage per Tick: 39.93 → 60 Retaliate (Hunter Hood) Reflected Damage: 70% → 100%

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Spell fixes

subitems.text: Mistcloud (Mistwalker Jacket) conceals Celestial Censer and Torch
Fixed issue where Spider Thread (Duskweaver Helmet) stat block disappeared during multispell
Fixed issue where mount-up could be interrupted by casts that deal no damage but slow, silence, or root
Fixed issue where Purge (Fiend Cowl) did not purge Hyperfocus
Fixed issue where Mythical Web (Duskweaver Armor) falsely purged Iron Will
Fixed issue where Hyper Focus (Feyscale Hat) prevented Armor Piercer (Cursed Staffs) from hitting player
Fixed issue where Wild Magic’s Storm Shield (Feyscale Robe) could chain trigger with Requite

items.text: Crafting Fey Armor now fills Laborer Journals as intended
Fixed issue where opening Guild Details UI closed world map
Fixed issue where travel to Guild Island with same name as character was not possible via Travel Planner or Island Merchant
Fixed issue where offline timers of Guild Members displayed incorrectly
Fixed issue where players could not travel to Guild Island set as Home with equipment
Fixed issue where players under Outland city shrine buff could receive Outlaw status
Invincibility effect of Outland shrine buff now breaks with additional world interactions
Fixed issue where enchantment would display incorrectly after killing hide mobs
Fixed issue where unlocalized enemy names would sometimes display during targeting
Fixed issue where players could join guilds via autojoin even during cooldown
Fixed issue where Faction Transport mission invisibility buff indicator remained even after buff expired
Fixed issue where players dismounting from battle mounts could become stuck in Power Cores and Pristine resources
Fixed several display issues when traveling via Travel Planner or Outland portals
Fixed rare issue where Weakened Wisp Sanctuary Portals were not visible
Fixed names of T4 Resource Mobs in Roads of Avalon
[Virtual Joystick / Controller] Fixed issue where some neutrally targeted spells would look for a new closer target when a friendly target was selected
Additional localization, UI, terrain and animation fixes
